name: Butternut Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the butter and powdered sugar together thoroughly.
2. Add flour and salt to the mixture; stir until combined.
3. Mix in the finely chopped nuts until evenly distributed.
4. Form the stiff dough into 1-1/2 inch long egg shapes.
5. Place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for about 15 minutes, or until lightly golden.
7. Allow to cool on a wire rack.
8. Drizzle half of the cookies with powdered sugar glaze or melted chocolate.
9. Decorate with coconut, chopped nuts, colored sugar, or other desired toppings.
10. Let the glazed portion set before serving.
Powdered Sugar Glaze:
1 cup unsifted Powdered sugar
1-1/2 tablespoons water
